description: Create Model Documentation page, add it to sidebar navigation, enhance AI chat with new topic handlers, update suggested questions, and update MANUAL_SETUP_NOTES.md.
steps: Create frontend/app/(dashboard)/model-docs/page.tsx - a documentation page with: Model Cards section (Location Scoring XGBoost and Credit Risk Logistic Regression in Google Model Card format), Business Impact Summary (from executive_summary.json data), Data Pipeline Overview (which notebook produces what - NB01 through NB08), Model Limitations and Ethical Considerations section, Deployment Readiness Checklist. Use the glass-card styling pattern from other pages. Use lucide-react BookOpen icon.
Update frontend/components/dashboard/Sidebar.tsx: Add 'modelDocs' nav item with href '/model-docs' and BookOpen icon from lucide-react. Place it after 'reports' and before 'settings'.
Update frontend/lib/translations/types.ts: Add 'modelDocs: string' to the sidebar interface.
Update frontend/lib/translations/en.ts: Add modelDocs: 'Model Docs' to sidebar.
Update frontend/lib/translations/id.ts: Add modelDocs: 'Dokumentasi Model' to sidebar.

Update frontend/components/chat/FloatingChatPanel.tsx getEnhancedResponse function to add new topic handlers: (a) 'model performance'/'performa model' -> show AUC-ROC, KS, R2 metrics; (b) 'dbscan'/'spatial cluster' -> explain DBSCAN results (408 clusters, noise ratio); (c) 'counterfactual'/'bagaimana meningkatkan'/'how to improve' -> general improvement advice based on feature importance; (d) 'model card'/'dokumentasi model' -> summarize model cards.

Update frontend/lib/knowledge-base.ts suggestedQuestions to add new topics per persona: bank gets 'Bagaimana performa model credit scoring?', government gets 'Bagaimana meningkatkan skor UMKM?', investor gets 'Apa dokumentasi model yang digunakan?'.

Update docs/MANUAL_SETUP_NOTES.md: Add a section about the new Model Documentation page, note that model performance data comes from ml/data/executive_summary.json, note that if notebooks are re-run the static frontend values should be updated.
acceptance_criteria: Model Docs page renders at /model-docs with model cards, business impact, pipeline overview, limitations, and deployment checklist
Sidebar shows Model Docs link with BookOpen icon between Reports and Settings
i18n translations work for the new sidebar item in both EN and ID
AI chat responds to 'model performance', 'dbscan', 'counterfactual'/'bagaimana meningkatkan', and 'model card'/'dokumentasi model' queries
Suggested questions include new topics per persona
MANUAL_SETUP_NOTES.md has new section about Model Documentation page
pnpm test:ci passes all existing tests
findings: All 8 steps completed successfully. Build and tests pass. Model-docs page renders at /model-docs with 2.9kB size.
